text:
Judge issues blow to Trump administration over Kennedy Center
A federal judge ruled Trump couldn't rename the Washington, D.C., performing arts venue or close its doors for lengthy renovations unless Congress approves the plans.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Good Morning America Full Broadcast - Saturday, May 30, 2026
A bus crashed into six vehicles on Interstate 95 south of Washington, D.C., leaving five people dead and more than 40 injured; ABC News’ Senior White House Correspondent Selina Wang reports on a possible deal between the U.S. and Iran that would reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end the U.S. blockade; ABC News' Ike Ejiochi previews the highly anticipated Game 7 matchup between the San Antonio Spurs and the Oklahoma City Thunder, deciding who will face the New York Knicks in the NBA finals; Parenting expert Ericka Souter is here with a playbook to help parents keep children busy and entertained while creating a relaxing summer for the whole family; and more on ABC's Good Morning America.

–––

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
United Airlines flight bound for Minneapolis was diverted to Wisconsin Friday night
Panic in the skies as a United Airlines flight bound for Minneapolis was diverted to Wisconsin Friday night to remove an unruly passenger, officials said.
 
At one point, air traffic controllers feared there could be a hijacking attempt.
 
ABC News' Gio Benitez has the details.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Temu was hit with a 200 million euro ($232 million) fine Thursday
Temu was hit with a 200 million euro ($232 million) fine Thursday after a European Union investigation found the Chinese online retailer failed to protect consumers from illegal products like toxic or hazardous toys and unsafe electronics.
